de.value: See exactly what the daily Pick of the Day stream would have returned at your own stake, using the actual pre-match odds stored for each pick. Opens the full calculator scoped to Bet of the Day only.
Simulate your Bet of the Day returns

From 16 April 2026 onward every new prediction is generated before its match starts and the outcome is recorded after full time. This is a separate stream tracked on the Live tab of /track-record. It starts small and grows daily; statistically meaningful tier numbers require ~200 graded picks per tier.

We apply the current model to historical matches using only information that was available at the moment of each kickoff (team form, Elo, H2H, standings). This tests whether the model learned general patterns rather than memorised specific results. Every tier accuracy on this site comes from this dataset.

BetsPlug earns revenue through premium subscriptions that unlock full access to our AI prediction engine, advanced analytics dashboards, and in-depth value betting insights across all supported leagues.

Our AI predictor is focused exclusively on football, covering the Premier League, La Liga, Serie A, Bundesliga, Ligue 1, Eredivisie, Champions League and more. New football leagues are added regularly as our models are trained and validated.

Each day BetsPlug Pulse selects the match with the strongest confidence signal. This is our Pick of the Day - currently at {potdAccuracy}% accuracy. You can also browse all other predictions on the platform.
We cover 70+ football competitions worldwide, including the Premier League, La Liga, Bundesliga, Serie A, Ligue 1, Eredivisie and all major UEFA competitions.
Strategy Lab is an upcoming feature that will let you filter predictions using backtested strategies. It is currently locked and marked as Coming Soon.
What is Pick of the Day?

Our engine combines Elo ratings, expected goals (xG), recent form, and dozens of contextual features. A machine-learning pipeline processes these inputs to produce calibrated AI predictions for every fixture.
AI predictions are typically available 24-48 hours before kick-off once team news and the latest Elo ratings have been factored in. Odds and value flags update right up until the match starts.

We track all leagues with live data syncs including the Premier League, La Liga, Bundesliga, Serie A, Ligue 1, and Eredivisie. Each league has its own Elo ratings, expected goals models, and accuracy stats.

Bet of the Day simulation stream (Gold+)
Our live results feed only keeps the last 30 days, and the backtest regime ended on 16 April 2026. Switch to Live to see picks logged since launch.
No backtest picks in this window

Average bookmaker odds paid across the picks in this window. Lower odds (e.g. 1.30) mean the pick was a heavy favourite — you win less per correct bet, so you need a higher win rate to come out ahead.
The win rate you need to hit — given the average odds — just to not lose money. If your actual win rate is below this number, the simulator will be in the red even if accuracy looks healthy.
Return calculated with the actual pre-match 1X2 odds stored for each fixture. Flat stake, one unit per pick, no compounding. Educational simulation — not financial or betting advice.
Note: {count} of {total} picks had no odds on file and use a flat 1.90 fallback.
Follow the four steps to see what our live picks would have returned at your own stake. Simulation runs against strict pre-match odds from 16 April 2026 onwards.
Note: {count} of {total} picks had no bookmaker odds on file — fair odds were derived from the model probability (1 / prob).

Only {n} graded picks so far. Early streaks are noisy — even with a strong long-term model, a short run of losses can easily drop you below break-even. Wait for at least 30 picks before drawing conclusions about the model.
Everything combined — good for volume, mixes two different data regimes.

Are your numbers based on live predictions or model validation?
Why is the live measurement still small?
How do I know your model validation is honest?
How many picks actually turned out to be right. Measured after the final whistle, not guessed before.
Tipsters love to blur the line. We don't. One is a claim we make before kickoff, the other is the score we prove afterwards. Here's the plain-English version.
Free-tier entry level. Real predictions, wider net.
Models disagree or the edge over the market is too thin. These stay on the bench instead of being dressed up as picks.
Rare, highest-conviction calls. Fewest picks, sharpest hit rate.
Solid edge, more volume, a little more variance.
Higher tier = stricter filter = fewer picks but higher accuracy. That's the whole trade-off.
Only picks above a strict threshold earn a tier badge. The higher the threshold, the fewer picks — and the sharper they are.

sw.value: The Pick of the Day, but only when it was locked before kickoff by the live scheduler and graded afterwards. No backtest, no retroactive rows. This measurement starts small and grows every day a BOTD fixture is played.
4 · Pick of the Day — live measurement
See exactly what the daily Pick of the Day stream would have returned at your own stake, using the actual pre-match odds stored for each pick. Opens the full calculator scoped to Bet of the Day only.
Simulate your Bet of the Day returns

Pick of the Day is a feature for Gold and Platinum subscribers — these numbers show how the feature would have performed historically. In production each pick is timestamped and locked before kick-off.

Our BOTD method (the highest-confidence pick per day) applied to matches that have since finished. This is backtest data — an honest proxy for how the feature would have performed historically. The strict pre-match live version lives in section 4 below.
Our v8.1 engine (XGBoost + calibrated logistic) ranks every match for a day. The pick with the highest probability in a Gold-tier league wins.
Once the result arrives each pick is labelled ✅ or ❌. The numbers above are a simple tally: correct / evaluated.
Each pick is one row in the database with a timestamp before kickoff. Point-in-time features (Elo, form, H2H, standings) — never post-hoc data.
3 · Pick of the Day — historical backtest
Raw data behind the KPIs above. Scroll to see everything.
The daily best pick, replayed on
The CSV contains every pick counted in the four KPIs above — with date, match, league, pick, confidence, score and outcome. Feel free to recompute the accuracy yourself in Excel or Sheets.
Want to verify the full dataset yourself?

Bet of the Day simulation stream (Gold+)
Our live results feed only keeps the last 30 days, and the backtest regime ended on 16 April 2026. Switch to Live to see picks logged since launch.
No backtest picks in this window

Average bookmaker odds paid across the picks in this window. Lower odds (e.g. 1.30) mean the pick was a heavy favourite — you win less per correct bet, so you need a higher win rate to come out ahead.
The win rate you need to hit — given the average odds — just to not lose money. If your actual win rate is below this number, the simulator will be in the red even if accuracy looks healthy.
Return calculated with the actual pre-match 1X2 odds stored for each fixture. Flat stake, one unit per pick, no compounding. Educational simulation — not financial or betting advice.
Note: {count} of {total} picks had no odds on file and use a flat 1.90 fallback.
Follow the four steps to see what our live picks would have returned at your own stake. Simulation runs against strict pre-match odds from 16 April 2026 onwards.
Note: {count} of {total} picks had no bookmaker odds on file — fair odds were derived from the model probability (1 / prob).

Only {n} graded picks so far. Early streaks are noisy — even with a strong long-term model, a short run of losses can easily drop you below break-even. Wait for at least 30 picks before drawing conclusions about the model.
Everything combined — good for volume, mixes two different data regimes.
Model validation on historical data — no wagering against closing odds.
Strict pre-match picks logged since 16 April 2026. Matches the live track record.

Bet of the Day is always Gold tier — scope is locked.

How far back should we look? Pick a preset or type any number of days.
What you would have won or lost with these settings.
Live = strict pre-match picks since 16 Apr 2026 (matches the track record). Backtest = historical model validation. All = both combined.

Every prediction is labelled with a tier based on model confidence. The higher the tier, the stricter the threshold and the sharper the numbers.

pl.value: See exactly what the daily Pick of the Day stream would have returned at your own stake, using the actual pre-match odds stored for each pick. Opens the full calculator scoped to Bet of the Day only.
Simulate your Bet of the Day returns

Our Pick of the Day has {potdAccuracy}% accuracy over {potdPicks} picks. Overall 3-way match predictions (home/draw/away) hit around 50%. Every prediction uses only data available before kickoff and is scored automatically — you can inspect every row yourself.

Each day BetsPlug Pulse selects the match with the strongest confidence signal. This is our Pick of the Day - currently at {potdAccuracy}% accuracy. You can also browse all other predictions on the platform.
Yes. The track record page lets you download the full prediction history as a CSV file. Every prediction, every result - nothing hidden.
We cover 70+ football competitions worldwide, including the Premier League, La Liga, Bundesliga, Serie A, Ligue 1, Eredivisie and all major UEFA competitions.
Strategy Lab is an upcoming feature that will let you filter predictions using backtested strategies. It is currently locked and marked as Coming Soon.
No. BetsPlug is a football analytics platform. We publish probabilities and a verifiable track record. What you do with that information is entirely your decision.
What is Pick of the Day?
Which football leagues do you cover?
Yes, a selection of upcoming match predictions is available for free on this page. Premium members unlock every fixture, full probability breakdowns, value betting alerts, and advanced Elo analytics.
Each prediction shows a percentage reflecting the model's confidence. Compare these AI-generated probabilities with bookmaker odds to spot value picks where the true chance exceeds the implied odds.
How do I interpret the probability scores?
